app.title: Arithmetic Expression Tree Visualizer
app.subtitle: Enter any arithmetic expression and see it parsed into an interactive tree.

hero.subtitle: A senior-grade tokenizer, recursive-descent parser and interactive D3 renderer — wrapped in a premium Web3-inspired interface.

workspace.title: Parse. Visualize. Inspect.
workspace.subtitle: Type an expression, launch the parser, and pan / zoom the resulting tree — every step is traced.

features.title: Built with a production-grade pipeline
features.subtitle: From raw text to an interactive tree, every layer is intentional and observable.

tokenizer.title: Smart tokenizer
tokenizer.desc: Scans identifiers, numbers and operators with precise position tracking for actionable error messages.

parser.title: Recursive-descent parser
parser.desc: Honors precedence and right-associative exponent, yielding a clean AST plus step-by-step trace.

visualizer.title: Interactive D3 renderer
visualizer.desc: React owns the DOM — D3 computes layout & zoom. Smooth, accessible, RTL-aware.

how.title: Four crisp stages, zero magic
how.subtitle: Full transparency from keystroke to rendered node.

step1.title: Input
step1.desc: Type or pick from curated examples in the input panel.

step2.title: Tokenize
step2.desc: The expression is scanned into typed tokens with positions.

step3.title: Parse
step3.desc: A recursive-descent parser builds the AST and emits trace steps.

step4.title: Visualize
step4.desc: D3 lays out the tree, React renders every node with hover hints.

cta.title: Drop in an expression — we'll handle the rest
cta.subtitle: No installs, no sign-ups. Just paste, parse, and explore.

footer.about: A premium full-stack visualizer for arithmetic expression trees, designed with a Web3-grade aesthetic.
footer.built: Crafted with React, Express, D3 & Tailwind.

tree.title: Expression Tree
tree.empty: Enter an expression above and click "Generate tree" to see the visualization.

steps.title: Parsing Steps
steps.empty: Parsing steps will appear here after a tree is generated.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.tryAnother: Try adjusting your expression and generate again.

codes.TOO_LONG: The expression is too long (max 500 characters).
codes.ILLEGAL_CHARACTER: The expression contains an illegal character.
codes.INVALID_NUMBER: One of the numbers is invalid.
codes.SYNTAX_ERROR: The expression has a syntax error.
